Describe the sequence of camera angles and visible environments throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 4s, an underwater view shows swimmers near the surface with lane lines; at 8s, the camera angles up towards white clouds and a roof structure; at 12s, the scene shifts to water-level showing snorkelers and a red goal frame; at 16s, the camera submerges to reveal pool lanes and wall targets.

question: Describe the visible actions and gear of the people in the water.
canonical_answer: At 4s, swimmers in dark swimwear appear near the surface; at 12s, individuals wearing snorkel masks and caps are visible above water; at 14s, a person underwater wears long brown fins amidst bubbles; at 18s, a swimmer moves horizontally across the frame underwater near lane lines.
